_meta.purpose: Locations (stations + hospitals) and per-route drive-time standards for the shift engine.
_meta.driveTimes_are: ACCEPTED STANDARD journey times in minutes, NOT live/GPS times. These are the agreed figures a crew would claim, normal-traffic driving (no blue lights on return legs).
_meta.source_status: confirmed = set by a user who knows the route. estimate = derived from OSM coordinates, road-winding factor applied, UNVERIFIED. seed = placeholder, no data yet.
_meta.note: The engine only needs minutes per ordered pair. Coordinates are kept for seeding estimates and for adding new pairs later. Return leg = same as outbound unless a user overrides it.
